hooks.command: cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && git add -A && git diff-index --quiet HEAD || git commit -m "wip: $(date +'%H:%M')" 2>/dev/null || true
cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && git add -A && git diff-index --quiet HEAD || git commit -m "session: $(date +'%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')" && git push origin $(git branch --show-current) 2>/dev/null || true
